title: Domain-Driven Design published
description: Eric Evans published Domain-Driven Design: Tackling Complexity in the Heart of Software — the foundational text that formalized bounded contexts, aggregates, and ubiquitous language.
sddConnection: SDD inherits the building block vocabulary. Gap categories SG and LG derive from Evans's concepts.

title: CQRS + Event Sourcing patterns
description: Greg Young formalized Command Query Responsibility Segregation and Event Sourcing as patterns for building event-driven systems.
sddConnection: Event-sourced specification model. Commands, events, and projections as first-class building blocks.

title: Implementing DDD published
description: Vaughn Vernon published Implementing Domain-Driven Design — the tactical companion to Evans's strategic text, introducing the small aggregate heuristic.
sddConnection: Small aggregate heuristic → HG threshold defaults. Vernon's command density guideline is an SDD heuristic.

title: EventStorming formalized
description: Alberto Brandolini introduced EventStorming — a collaborative workshop format for domain discovery using sticky notes.
sddConnection: Architecture palette inherits the sticky note vocabulary. EventStorming is discovery; SDD is verification.

title: Bounded Context Canvas
description: Nick Tune created the Bounded Context Canvas — a structured template for documenting context boundaries and relationships.
sddConnection: Strategic DDD tooling precedent. The canvas is a design tool; the gap report is a diagnostic tool.

title: "DDD isn't done" keynote
description: Eric Evans delivered the 'DDD isn't done' keynote at Explore DDD, calling for continued evolution of DDD practices.
sddConnection: SDD answers the call: here's what's next — a definition of done for the domain model itself.

title: Collaborative Software Design
description: Kenny Baas-Schwegler advanced collaborative software design practices, integrating cognitive bias awareness into domain modeling.
sddConnection: Cognitive bias awareness in modeling — gap reports surface biases that informal review misses.

title: Learning DDD published
description: Vlad Khononov published Learning Domain-Driven Design — modern DDD pedagogy that made tactical and strategic patterns accessible to a broader audience.
sddConnection: Modern DDD pedagogy. Khononov's clarity influenced how SDD explains its building blocks.

title: Narrative-Driven Development
description: Xolvio introduced Narrative-Driven Development and the temporal vocabulary — the moment primitive and temporal scope for domain events.
sddConnection: Moment primitive, temporal scope. NDD's vocabulary influenced how SDD thinks about event lifecycle.

title: LLMs + DDD keynote
description: Eric Evans explored the intersection of large language models and domain-driven design at Explore DDD 2024.
sddConnection: Independent convergence with SDD — Evans reached similar conclusions about AI-assisted domain modeling from a different direction.

title: Balancing Coupling published
description: Vlad Khononov published Balancing Coupling in Software Design — treating coupling as a measurable, manageable property rather than something to blindly minimize.
sddConnection: Coupling as measurable heuristic → threshold model. SDD's gap thresholds follow the same philosophy.

title: AI Components for Deterministic Systems
description: Eric Evans presented on using Anti-Corruption Layers between deterministic domain systems and probabilistic AI components.
sddConnection: Same ACL pattern we built independently — SDD uses structured templates as the anti-corruption layer between AI and domain truth.

title: Context Mapping with AI
description: Eric Evans presented 'Context Mapping with an AI-based Component' — applying strategic DDD patterns to AI integration.
sddConnection: Same ACL pattern we built independently. The convergence validates the approach.

title: LLM + Strategic Design workshops
description: DDD Europe 2026 featured workshops on integrating LLMs with strategic design — the community mainstreaming AI + DDD.
sddConnection: Community mainstreaming the same ideas SDD has been building on.

title: Signal-Driven Development published
description: Signal-Driven Development published — three-pass convergence, gap reports as diagnostic signals, zero unresolved gaps as the definition of done.
sddConnection: This is the methodology you're reading about right now.
